name: emit_spec
description: Emit a synthetic data spec matching the user's request. ALWAYS call this — never respond with plain text.

count.description: Number of rows to generate. Maximum 200.

stream_interval_sec.description: Optional. Seconds between records when the data is streamed. Set this ONLY if the prompt mentions a streaming cadence. Convert rates to seconds-per-record: 'every 2 seconds' -> 2, 'one row a minute' -> 60, '10 per second' -> 0.1. Omit if the prompt says nothing about streaming rate.

correlations.description: Optional. Inter-field correlations. Omit when fields should be independent. Each entry is either a 'derived' relationship (one target = slope*source + intercept + noise) or a 'multivariate' joint Gaussian over 2+ numeric fields with a correlation matrix.

source.description: Derived only: field name that drives the target.

target.description: Derived only: field name being computed.

noise_std.description: Derived only. Gaussian noise std-dev added to the linear prediction.

fields.description: Multivariate only: 2+ numeric field names that move together.

correlation.description: Multivariate only: N x N symmetric matrix with 1.0 on the diagonal and pairwise correlations in [-1, 1] off-diagonal.

provider.description: One of the allowed provider names listed in the system prompt.

args.description: Keyword arguments passed to the provider (e.g. min_value, max_value, elements, start_date).

magnitude.description: Scaling factor; meaning depends on anomaly type.
